name: Protionamide
description: Prothionamide has been used in trials studying the treatment of MDR-TB and HIV Infections.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Protionamide.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Protionamide.
